calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2012 Set For Trial On Dec-17-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kent Bradbury, Esq., from Fox Rothschild LLP, 415-364-5540, for defendants and moving party
Jessica Juarez, Esq., from Albert G. Stoll, Jr. a Law Corporation, 415-576-1500, for plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling:
DEFENDANTS SUTTER HEALTH AND SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS, DBA CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Sutter Health's Demurrer to the first and second cause of action overruled. Sutter Health's and California Pacific Medical Center's demurrers to the third cause of action for conversion sustained without leave to amend. The Labor Code displaces a conversion claim on these facts. (Thomas v. Home Depot USA Inc. (2007) 527 F.Supp.2d 1003, 1009.) Defendants have ten days to answer. Order signed in open court. Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2012 Continued To Apr-10-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS DBA CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER and SUTTER HEALTH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Continued to April 10, 2012 per the ex parte order filed March 19. Parties are reminded to provide courtesy copies to Department 302. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
